# Advanced Meta-Analysis

::: {.callout-note}
## Drafting note
Chapter content in progress. Migrate the corresponding text here; use `$...$` / `$$...$$` for math, place figures in `images/`, and use ```{r} or ```{python} code blocks.
:::

## Meta-analysis of diagnostic studies

_To be added._

## Network meta-analysis

_To be added._

## Multiple-outcome network meta-analysis

_To be added._

## Prospective meta-analysis

_To be added._
